allow: PowerShell($paths = @\("C:\\Program Files\\R", "C:\\Program Files \(x86\)\\R", "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Programs\\R"\); foreach \($p in $paths\) { if \(Test-Path $p\) { Get-ChildItem $p -Directory | Select-Object FullName } }; Write-Output "---"; python -c "import psycopg2; print\('psycopg2 OK', psycopg2.__version__\)" 2>&1)

PowerShell($out = & "C:\\Program Files\\R\\R-4.5.1\\bin\\Rscript.exe" -e "cat\('R works\\n'\); cat\(rownames\(installed.packages\(\)\), sep='\\n'\)" 2>&1; $out | Select-String -Pattern "^stern" -SimpleMatch; Write-Output "---"; Write-Output "exit: $LASTEXITCODE")

PowerShell(& "C:\\Program Files\\R\\R-4.5.1\\bin\\Rscript.exe" -e "if \(!'remotes' %in% rownames\(installed.packages\(\)\)\) install.packages\('remotes', repos='https://cloud.r-project.org'\); remotes::install_github\('EmilyRStern/stern', upgrade='never', quiet=FALSE\)" 2>&1)

PowerShell(cd "C:\\Users\\erose\\Documents\\GitHub\\im-final"; $job = Start-Job -ScriptBlock { Set-Location $using:PWD; & "C:\\Program Files\\R\\R-4.5.1\\bin\\Rscript.exe" -e "options\(error = function\(\) { traceback\(\); quit\(status=1\) }\); message\('about to runApp'\); shiny::runApp\('shiny/', port = 4848, launch.browser = FALSE, host = '127.0.0.1'\)" 2>&1 }; Start-Sleep -Seconds 12; Receive-Job $job; Write-Output "--- port? ---"; netstat -ano | Select-String ":4848"; Stop-Job $job -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Remove-Job $job -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Get-Process Rscript -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Stop-Process -Force)
